note: Domain/MCP plugins not yet packaged (were marketplace.json staged:true). Promote into plugins[] when their SKILL.md/server is real, not a MIGRATION-TARGET.md placeholder.

staged_plugins.name: brain-3-lane-orchestration
staged_plugins.description: Three-lane parallel orchestration (Brain + Triora + Pillarworks) via SYNC_STATE + CONTROL_STATE. Brain-specific overrides on top of cross-cutting orchestration/3-lane-parallel.

staged_plugins.name: brain-ecosystem-config
staged_plugins.description: Cross-product ecosystem configuration management for Brain. Triggers on cross-product config changes.

staged_plugins.name: crash-repair-vertical-template
staged_plugins.description: First instance of the vertical-industry-setup template framework. Crash-repair-specific: agents/, prompts/, standards/, architecture/{decisions,schemas}/. Reusable scaffold for industry-specific Claude setups.

staged_plugins.name: directors-portal-ui-ux
staged_plugins.description: UI/UX patterns for the Directors Portal (React + RSC + tenant-isolated dashboard). Lifted from D:\orryx-brain\clients\directors-portal\.claude\skills\ui-ux-pro-max.

staged_plugins.name: flow-clinical-workflows
staged_plugins.description: Clinical workflow patterns. Triggers on clinic-operations work (intake, triage, charting, billing handoff).

staged_plugins.name: flow-phi-exposure
staged_plugins.description: PHI exposure audit slash command for Orryx Flow (/audit-phi-exposure). Triggers when reviewing PHI-handling code in clinical workflow operations.

staged_plugins.name: flow-tenant-security
staged_plugins.description: Multi-tenant security validation for Orryx Flow (/validate-tenant-security). Triggers when reviewing tenant isolation in clinic-operations features.

staged_plugins.name: pillarworks-agents-bundle
staged_plugins.description: Reference agent bundle for Pillarworks: 11 Claude YAMLs + 2 ChatGPT verifier configs + shared handoff-protocol. Template for product-specific agent bundles.

staged_plugins.name: pillarworks-domain-check
staged_plugins.description: Construction domain wording consistency and estimation safety check for Pillarworks BOQ automation.

staged_plugins.name: triora-document-library
staged_plugins.description: Complete document library index for Triora. Triggers on "where is X documented" within Triora.

staged_plugins.name: triora-healthcare-context
staged_plugins.description: Australian healthcare regulations + PHI handling rules + clinical safety constraints for Triora. Triggers when working on clinical trial matching, patient data, or anything PHI-adjacent. Production-grade.

staged_plugins.name: triora-orryx-integration
staged_plugins.description: Orryx ecosystem integration for Triora (MCP Gateway, Auth0, cross-repo protocol). Triggers when integrating Triora with other Orryx services.

staged_plugins.name: triora-production-testing
staged_plugins.description: Autonomous production testing via GitHub Actions WAF bypass. Triggers when production tests need to run from inside the VPC. Re-usable for any AU-locked product.

staged_plugins.name: triora-research-integration
staged_plugins.description: Rules for integrating research outputs into operational documentation. Triora-specific.

staged_plugins.name: triora-task-workflows
staged_plugins.description: Task-based document workflows for Triora (which docs to read for planning, development, governance). Triggers on Sprint planning within Triora.
